overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing the character Arthur Morgan walking along a dirt trail through open prairie grassland at dusk. The character approaches a large layered rock formation while dramatic purple and pink clouds fill the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with winding dirt trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through tall prairie grass toward distant mountains

entered.detail: large multi-tiered sedimentary rock formation rising from the prairie
hazy mountain silhouettes on the horizon beneath purple clouds
old wooden windmill structure visible in the distant field
narrow worn path cutting through the tall grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open prairie land at dusk. A large layered rock mesa dominates the right side of the frame while distant mountains and a wooden windmill are visible on the horizon under a dramatic cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching large rock outcrop on prairie trail

events.description: sky brightens with warmer pink and orange hues illuminating the clouds

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the large rock formation looms larger ahead

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, the large rock mesa shifts from the right side to become the dominant central feature ahead. The distant mountains and windmill fade from view while the sky takes on warmer pink tones. The trail leads directly toward the base of the impressive rock formation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural trail that shifts from an expansive prairie view to a focused approach toward a massive rock formation. It begins with the character walking through open grassland at dusk, with a large layered mesa framing the right side of the view while a wooden windmill and distant mountains sit on the horizon. As the character advances, the perspective shifts and the mesa moves from the periphery to become the dominant central feature ahead. The distant landmarks fade from view while the dramatic cloudy sky transitions into warmer pink tones. The scene finally narrows its focus as the dirt trail leads the character directly toward the imposing base of the rock formation.
